title: Dynabeads for IP Reagent-In-Plate Plate Prep 1
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol (Plate Prep 1) performs pipetting to transfer reagents (Dynabeads and antibody dilution) from 15 mL conical tubes to a 96 well deepwell plate (the reagent plate) on the OT2. This reagent plate is used for Dynabeads for IP Reagent-In-Plate protocol Part 1. The user can determine the number of samples to be processed.
steps_raw: This protocol (Plate Prep 1) performs pipetting to transfer reagents (Dynabeads and antibody dilution) from 15 mL conical tubes to a 96 well deepwell plate (the reagent plate) on the OT2. This reagent plate is used for Dynabeads for IP Reagent-In-Plate protocol Part 1. The user can determine the number of samples to be processed.
